{"value":{"key":"persistence-v1","type":"decision","content":"# Architecture: Firestore Persistence (Implemented)
The application has fully migrated from `localStorage` to Google Cloud Firestore.
- **Service**: `src/services/TaskService.js`
- **Sync**: Uses `onSnapshot` for real-time, multi-tab synchronization.
- **Lifecycle**: State is managed as a real-time stream in `App.jsx`, removing the need for manual storage listeners.
- **Config**: Defined in `src/firebase.js`.","tags":["persistence","firestore","sync","architecture"],"metadata":{"importance":"critical","file":"App.jsx","accessCount":0},"createdAt":1777139766714,"updatedAt":1777165458741,"relationships":{}},"expires":null}

{"value":{"key":"categorization-v1","type":"pattern","content":"Added color-coded task categorization (Personal, Work, Urgent, Shopping). Implemented context-aware filtering where the sidebar acts as a list switcher, filtering the main view based on the task.category field.","tags":["categorization","filtering","ui"],"metadata":{"importance":"high","component":"TaskModal","accessCount":0},"createdAt":1777139766716,"updatedAt":1777139766716},"expires":null}

{"value":{"key":"search-v1","type":"feature","content":"Universal real-time search implemented in the header. Filters tasks by matching searchQuery against both title and details. Integrated into the main task filtering pipeline to work alongside category and status filters.","tags":["search","ux"],"metadata":{"importance":"medium","component":"App.jsx","accessCount":0},"createdAt":1777139766716,"updatedAt":1777139766716},"expires":null}

{"value":{"key":"insights-v1","type":"feature","content":"Productivity Insights dashboard calculates real-time completion rates and categorical focus breakdown. Uses CSS-only progress bars for focus analysis. Updates dynamically as tasks are completed.","tags":["analytics","insights","dashboard"],"metadata":{"importance":"medium","component":"StatsDashboard","accessCount":0},"createdAt":1777139766717,"updatedAt":1777139766717},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"67acc019-df5a-48c3-964e-1e6eadb347ed","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"mcp-config-v1","type":"decision","content":"Registered the agent-memory-mcp server in /home/ubuntu/.gemini/antigravity/mcp_config.json for automatic lifecycle management. The server is configured with project ID 'google-todo-app' and workspace path '/home/ubuntu/todolist'. It exposes tools like memory_write, memory_search, and memory_read. This eliminates the need for manual server startup and integrates the memory bank natively into the Antigravity agent toolkit.","tags":["mcp","config","automation","setup"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777140367014,"updatedAt":1777140367014},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"9092dda3-0895-419f-b0cc-77e5d3104b88","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"recurring-tasks-plan-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Implementation Plan: Recurring Tasks
Add the ability for users to set tasks to repeat daily, weekly, or monthly. When a recurring task is completed, a new instance is created for the next interval.
## Scope
- In: recurrence field, TaskService recurrence engine, TaskModal UI selector.
- Out: Complex rules, notifications.
## Action Items
1. Modify Task schema to support recurrence.
2. Add UI selection in TaskModal.
3. Implement handleRecurrence in TaskService to calculate next dueDate.
4. Update toggleTask logic in App.jsx to trigger recurrence.
5. Add visual 'Repeat' icon to tasks.
","tags":["plan","recurring-tasks","roadmap"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777140985984,"updatedAt":1777140985984},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"4add1855-f726-4e73-9702-232fb99c7d6d","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"subtasks-plan-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Implementation Plan: Sub-tasks (Nested Checklists)
Enable one-level nesting of tasks. Users can add a list of checklist items within a single task to track granular progress.
## Scope
- In: subtasks array [{id, title, completed}], Modal UI for management, Progress fraction in main list.
- Out: Deep nesting, sub-task due dates.
## Action Items
1. Update Task schema with subtasks array.
2. Build Sub-task management UI in TaskModal.
3. Implement progress tracking logic (completed/total).
4. Show "X/Y" progress indicator in task rows.
","tags":["plan","subtasks","roadmap"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777141965137,"updatedAt":1777141965137},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"4f307d71-8109-4f3e-ba4a-975174e52fd2","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"skill-index-v1","type":"pattern","content":"# Active Skills Index - google-todo-app
A list of skills currently utilized and preferred for this project.
- **agent-memory-mcp**: Used for project-wide indexing and fast context recall.
- **kaizen**: The primary framework for brainstorming and continuous feature improvement.
- **concise-planning**: Used for creating atomic implementation plans for new features.
- **git-pushing**: Managed workflow for conventional commits and remote synchronization.
- **frontend-design**: Used for Google/Material-inspired UI and aesthetics.
- **systematic-debugging**: Used for diagnosing and fixing complex state/persistence issues.
- **firestore-integration**: (Planned) Used for Google Cloud Firestore synchronization and real-time backend logic.
","tags":["meta","skills","index"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777143143543,"updatedAt":1777145720390},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"41f3c3e0-46b9-48ac-a664-4cf8f12d5ecf","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"mb-preference-v1","type":"decision","content":"'MB' is the user's preferred shorthand for the Agent Memory Bank (agent-memory-mcp). Use this abbreviation for indexing, searching, and recall when the user refers to 'MB'.","tags":["preference","shorthand","ui"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777143463310,"updatedAt":1777143463310},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"8aecb4e1-603f-41d9-9fd4-4c8fa03edf5b","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"firestore-migration-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Implementation Plan: Firestore Migration
Migrate data layer from localStorage to Google Cloud Firestore.
## Approach
Refactor TaskService to use Firebase JS SDK (v10+). Implement real-time synchronization via Firestore onSnapshot.
## Key Tasks
1. Firebase SDK installation.
2. Initialize Firebase in src/firebase.js.
3. Refactor TaskService for Firestore CRUD.
4. Replace storage listener in App.jsx with onSnapshot.
5. Migrate existing localStorage data to Firestore.
","tags":["plan","firestore","migration","database"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777145578870,"updatedAt":1777145578870},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"fd9901ea-9277-46cd-9e2b-9bf35463d57b","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"firestore_config","type":"api","content":"# Firestore Configuration
The project uses Firebase/Firestore for data persistence.

## Configuration Details
- **Project ID**: `todolist-c6c81`
- **Auth Domain**: `todolist-c6c81.firebaseapp.com`
- **Storage Bucket**: `todolist-c6c81.firebasestorage.app`
- **API Key**: `AIzaSyC8-TmagjO-yarfdk0q-Qf_gM5_rJILzDc`
- **Messaging Sender ID**: `526793244888`
- **App ID**: `1:526793244888:web:086a92868fd80c479157ad`

## Usage
The configuration is used in `src/firebase.js` (or similar) and was tested in `scratch/test-firestore.js`.
The `TaskService.js` uses these settings to interact with the `tasks` collection.","tags":["firebase","firestore","config"],"relationships":{"dependsOn":[],"implements":[]},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777163060166,"updatedAt":1777163060166},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"262c76fd-6f41-43ea-95e6-c776163ec220","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"firestore_schema_tasks","type":"architecture","content":"# Firestore Data Schema - tasks collection
The main collection used in the application is `tasks`.

## Document Structure
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `title` | string | The title of the task |
| `details` | string | Detailed description |
| `completed` | boolean | Completion status |
| `starred` | boolean | Priority/starred status |
| `category` | string | e.g., 'personal', 'work' |
| `recurrence` | string | 'none', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly' |
| `subtasks` | array | Array of objects: `{ id, text, completed }` |
| `createdAt` | timestamp | Server timestamp |
| `dueDate` | string | YYYY-MM-DD format (used for recurrence calculation) |

## Implementation Details
- Managed by `TaskService.js`.
- Uses `onSnapshot` for real-time updates.
- Recurrence logic is handled client-side before adding the next instance.","tags":["firestore","schema","tasks"],"relationships":{"firestore_config":"Uses the configuration for access"},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777163063791,"updatedAt":1777163063791},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"e8e381ff-6004-431a-8e4b-379da87a8763","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"timeline-view-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Feature: Timeline View
A new navigation tab ("Schedule") has been added that renders a 7-day horizontal timeline.
- **Component**: `src/components/TimelineView.jsx`
- **Logic**: Filters tasks by `dueDate` and organizes them into daily columns.
- **Integration**: Accessed via the sidebar; replaces the main list view when the 'schedule' tab is active.","tags":["feature","timeline","navigation","ui"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777165457761,"updatedAt":1777165457761},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"882752fb-0ef9-43f0-8a45-b50cdc61175e","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"list-visuals-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Feature: Sub-tasks & Recurrence Visualization
Enhanced the main task list with granular progress and status indicators.
- **Sub-tasks**: Displays "X/Y" progress indicator in the task row when sub-tasks are present.
- **Recurrence**: Shows a "RotateCcw" icon and recurrence interval (e.g., 'daily') for repeating tasks.
- **UI**: Implemented in the main task list mapping within `App.jsx`.","tags":["feature","ui","subtasks","recurrence"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777165458761,"updatedAt":1777165458761},"expires":null}

{"value":{"id":"d1dd00e4-dfa9-4fee-aae0-c57f89b3b621","projectId":"google-todo-app","key":"overdue-highlight-v1","type":"feature","content":"# Feature: Overdue Task Highlighting
Tasks that are past their `dueDate` and not yet `completed` are now visually highlighted.
- **Visual**: The task title text color changes to `google-red` (#EA4335).
- **Implementation**: Added conditional logic in `App.jsx` using a string comparison between `task.dueDate` (YYYY-MM-DD) and the current local date (`new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]`).
- **Styles**: Utilizes the `text-google-red` and `font-medium` Tailwind/Vite classes.","tags":["feature","ui","overdue","ux"],"relationships":{},"metadata":{"accessCount":0,"createdBy":"agent"},"createdAt":1777168032370,"updatedAt":1777168032370},"expires":null}
